generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance OccupancyActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator embedded within BIM models for dynamic occupancy-based lighting control in the building infrastructure"
]

instance HVACSetpointActuator : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Actuator defining HVAC system setpoints through BIM-centric control logic for energy optimization"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance LightingScheduleActuator : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Actuator implementing TwinLight's layered architecture for automated lighting control adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightingDataTransmitted
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor embedded in building infrastructure capturing real-time temperature measurements for environmental monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy detector sensor embedded within BIM models to monitor building occupancy status"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance LightingLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting sensor embedded in building infrastructure measuring ambient lighting conditions"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightingDataTransmitted
]

instance EnvironmentalParameterSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Comprehensive IoT sensor suite capturing environmental parameters (humidity, CO₂, air quality) for operational monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Data Transmission
instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance LightingDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightingLevelSensor
]

instance EnvironmentalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnvironmentalParameterSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Core BIM model serving as semantic backbone with enriched device-level metadata for building infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineering
]

instance RuntimeDataModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic model integrating real-time operational data from IoT sensors for predictive analytics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance ControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM-embedded control logic model implementing TwinLight's layered architecture for adaptive building systems"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMModel
]

instance VisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D Unreal Engine model providing interactive visualization of building operational state"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5
]

instance SensorMetadataModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Automatically generated metadata model capturing sensor IDs, configurations, and control logic relationships"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineering
]

instance PerformanceBenchmarkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Comparative model benchmarking actual building performance against idealized BIM models"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BOREALIS
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Machine learning model framework implementing BOREALIS reinforcement learning for operational optimization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BOREALIS
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature measurement data streamed via Eclipse Hono/Ditto protocol"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RuntimeDataModel
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Occupancy status data captured from embedded IoT sensors for space utilization analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RuntimeDataModel
]

instance LightingData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ambient lighting level measurements used for adaptive control and energy optimization"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightingDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RuntimeDataModel
]

instance EnvironmentalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Comprehensive environmental parameter data (humidity, CO₂, air quality) for comfort and safety monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RuntimeDataModel
]

instance ControlLogicMetadata : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Metadata extracted from BIM models defining control logic relationships and device configurations"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SensorMetadataModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlLogicModel
]

instance PerformanceMetrics : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time operational metrics (energy consumption, comfort levels) for benchmarking against ideal models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RuntimeDataModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PerformanceBenchmarkModel
]

instance PredictiveForecasts : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Forecasted energy demand, equipment failures, and operational anomalies from ML models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData PredictiveAnalyticsModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BOREALIS
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Framework automating BIM model enrichment with device metadata and runtime interface generation"
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMModel, SensorMetadataModel
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Middleware platform facilitating real-time bidirectional communication between physical and virtual assets via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:enables RuntimeDataModel
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Game engine providing interactive 3D visualization of building operational state for immersive monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationModel
]

instance BOREALIS : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning framework implementing predictive analytics and adaptive control policies"
    DTDFVocab:enables PerformanceBenchmarkModel, PredictiveAnalyticsModel
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Immersive visualization service using Unreal Engine for real-time 3D representation of building conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance PredictiveOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service implementing BOREALIS RL framework for operational optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationAction, ComfortAdjustmentAction
]

instance AdaptiveControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dynamic control service implementing TwinLight's BIM-centric control logic for HVAC and lighting systems"
    DTDFVocab:provides HVACSetpointAction, LightingScheduleAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D spatial representation of building operational state including sensor readings and environmental conditions"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated energy efficiency adjustments based on predictive analytics and real-time sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ComfortAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustments to HVAC and lighting systems to optimize occupant comfort levels"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HVACSetpointAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Real-time adjustment of HVAC system setpoints through BIM-embedded control logic"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LightingScheduleAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated lighting schedule implementation using TwinLight's layered architecture"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C17: Environment
instance BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains OccupancyActuator, HVACSetpointActuator, LightingScheduleActuator,
    TemperatureSensor, OccupancySensor, LightingLevelSensor, EnvironmentalParameterSensor
]

instance OperationalDataEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains RuntimeDataModel, TemperatureData, OccupancyData, LightingData, EnvironmentalData
]

instance ControlSystemEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains ControlLogicModel, AdaptiveControlService, HVACSetpointActuator, LightingScheduleActuator
]

instance VisualizationEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains VisualizationModel, RealTimeMonitoringService, UnrealEngine5
]

instance OptimizationEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PredictiveAnalyticsModel, PredictiveOptimizationService, BOREALIS
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT generates control outputs via **Unreal Engine** for visualization and **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** for execution. Control signals (e.g., HVAC adjustments, lighting commands) are transmitted back to physical actuators through standardized APIs, ensuring real-time synchronization. The framework leverages model-driven transformations to map BIM-defined control logic to runtime interfaces, enabling automated commissioning and adaptive adjustments without manual intervention."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin operates with **real-time synchronization**, ensuring live data exchange between physical assets and the DT. The system is designed for immediate responsiveness, enabling continuous updates and adaptive control without latency. The time-scale is not specified with exact frequencies (e.g., 1-10 Hz), but the emphasis is on real-time interaction for operational optimization."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is organized as a **service-oriented architecture** with:
  1. A **central DT hub** (hosted on Ditto) managing bidirectional communication with physical assets via Eclipse Hono.
  2. **Domain-specific services** (e.g., lighting control, HVAC optimization) deployed as modular components, each with defined interfaces.
  3. **Interoperability layers** ensuring seamless integration with external systems (e.g., BIM tools, IoT gateways) via standardized protocols.
  4. **Real-time synchronization** between the DT and physical assets, enabling adaptive control and monitoring across the entire building lifecycle."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans **all lifecycle stages** of the building:
  1. **Design phase**: BIM models are enriched with device metadata (e.g., sensor/actuator placements) for automated DT generation.
  2. **Construction phase**: Device commissioning is automated via middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) to ensure BIM-to-physical alignment.
  3. **Operation phase**: Real-time synchronization occurs via live data streams, enabling adaptive control (e.g., BOREALIS’ iterative RL-based optimization). The DT also supports **refurbishment phases** through modular service upgrades and data-driven performance analysis."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Metadata Extraction**: Automated capture of relevant semantics from BIM models to maintain consistency between physical and virtual representations.
  - **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) Metric**: Quantifies the alignment and interoperability of the DT with its physical counterpart, ensuring operational accuracy."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between the physical twin (PT) and the Digital Twin (DT) relies on:
  - **Middleware Stack**: **Eclipse Hono** and **Ditto** for real-time data exchange and bidirectional communication.
  - **Bidirectional Communication Protocols**: Enables live synchronization of sensor data and control signals between physical assets and the DT."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed in a **scalable and modular architecture**, supporting distributed deployment across multiple services. The framework emphasizes extensibility and modularity, allowing for scalable integration of DT components without requiring full redeployment. The specific hosting technologies are not detailed, but the focus is on scalability and service-oriented deployment."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The system supports horizontal integration through:
  - **Stakeholder Collaboration**: Facilitates collaboration among Building Control Engineers, Facility Managers, and DT Engineers via unified BIM-based workflows.
  - **Interoperability with BIM Tools**: Ensures seamless integration with BIM platforms for consistent data representation and lifecycle management."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework adheres to:
  - **Open-Source Frameworks**: Leverages **Eclipse Ditto** and **Eclipse Hono** for real-time data exchange and interoperability.
  - **BIM Standards**: Uses Building Information Modeling (BIM) as the semantic backbone, ensuring compatibility with AECO-specific standards."
]
